reasoning: The SOC2 control CC7.4 focuses on incident response, which in a Kubernetes context can be mapped to ensuring that audit logging is enabled and properly configured to capture necessary events for incident analysis. Additionally, admission controllers can be configured to enforce security policies that help in incident prevention and response. NetworkPolicies can be used to monitor and alert on suspicious network activities, which is part of the incident response process.
title: CC7.4 The entity responds to identified security incidents by executing a defined incident response program to understand, contain, remediate, and communicate security incidents, as appropriate
